moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins on Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Main Event Kick-off
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is back! The Open Championship tees off from Royal Birkdale on Thursday, who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: UK Sport Focus
angles.copy: All eyes on Southport this week as Royal Birkdale hosts The Open! Expect some thrilling golf and maybe a few surprises from the links.

angles.name: Weekend Anticipation
angles.copy: Practice rounds are underway at Royal Birkdale, but the real action starts Thursday. Get ready for four days of world-class golf at The Open!

moments.title: U20 Rugby World Cup Semi-finals Today
moments.blurb: The U20 Rugby World Cup semi-finals are taking place today, July 13th, with England facing South Africa and France playing New Zealand.

angles.name: Semi-final Showdown
angles.copy: It's semi-final day at the U20 Rugby World Cup! England take on South Africa, while France battle New Zealand. Who's making it to the final?

angles.name: Young Guns Clash
angles.copy: Today's the day for future rugby stars! Catch the U20 Rugby World Cup semi-finals as the next generation fights for glory.

moments.title: England's World Cup Hopes
moments.blurb: England's journey in the 2026 World Cup continues, with recent reports indicating a semi-final clash against Norway.

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Is it coming home? England are deep into the World Cup 2026 semi-finals! Catch all the latest as the nation holds its breath.

angles.name: Bellingham Buzz
angles.copy: Jude Bellingham is at the heart of England's World Cup campaign. How crucial will he be in their quest for glory? #England

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a major one-day event featuring world-class track and field athletes, is scheduled for Saturday, July 18th, at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Track and Field Stars
angles.copy: Get ready for a sprint finish! The London Athletics Meet brings world-class talent to the London Stadium this Saturday. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: London's Sporting Weekend
angles.copy: World-class athletics lands in London this Saturday! The London Stadium hosts a huge line-up of track and field stars.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded yesterday, July 12th, after two weeks of thrilling tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Afterglow
angles.copy: Another incredible Wimbledon has come to an end! What was your favourite moment from this year's Championships?

angles.name: Champions Crowned
angles.copy: The grass season is over for another year. Hats off to all the champions at Wimbledon 2026!

moments.title: Ann Droid Launches on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars as a robot companion in the new comedy series 'Ann Droid', premiering on BBC One and iPlayer this Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' hits BBC One this Thursday – get ready for some futuristic laughs.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: From the minds behind 'Motherland', 'Ann Droid' promises to be a hilarious take on the future of care. Don't miss it, Thursday on BBC One!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK After the Altar
moments.blurb: The second 'After the Altar' special for 'Love is Blind: UK' Season 2 dropped yesterday, July 12th, globally on Netflix.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch Up
angles.copy: Did you tune into the Love is Blind: UK 'After the Altar' special yesterday? What did you make of all the drama?

angles.name: Relationship Revelations
angles.copy: All the tea has been spilled! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' is now streaming on Netflix. Binge it today!

moments.title: The Dark on ITV
moments.blurb: The new moody thriller series 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is airing this July on ITV.

angles.name: New Thriller Series
angles.copy: Looking for a gripping new drama? 'The Dark' is on ITV this month and promises to keep you on the edge of your seat. Have you started watching?

angles.name: ITV Drama
angles.copy: Escape into the Scottish wilderness with 'The Dark', the new ITV thriller. Perfect for those long summer evenings!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Music Icon's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 80th to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! A true music legend whose voice transcended genres.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: From 'You're No Good' to 'When Will I Be Loved', Linda Ronstadt's hits are timeless. Wishing her a very happy 80th for Wednesday!

moments.title: Joe Satriani Hits 70
moments.blurb: Virtuoso guitarist Joe Satriani, celebrated for his instrumental rock prowess, turns 70 on July 15th.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Shredding into his 70s! Happy Birthday to the phenomenal Joe Satriani on Wednesday. What's your favourite 'Satch' track?

angles.name: Instrumental Rock Master
angles.copy: A true guitar master, Joe Satriani celebrates his 70th on Wednesday. His influence on rock music is undeniable!

moments.title: Olly Alexander Turns 36
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman and Eurovision star Olly Alexander celebrates his 36th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Pop Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander on Wednesday! What's your go-to Years & Years track?

angles.name: Eurovision Star
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to Eurovision stages, Olly Alexander turns 36 on Wednesday! Celebrate with his incredible music.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland at 74
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and rock icon Stewart Copeland celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Rock Drummer Legend
angles.copy: The legendary beat of The Police! Happy 74th Birthday to Stewart Copeland this Thursday. What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Police Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland for Thursday! His drumming defined a generation of rock. #ThePolice

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: 5 Seconds of Summer frontman Luke Hemmings reaches the big 3-0 on July 16th.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to 5SOS's very own Luke Hemmings this Thursday! What's your favourite song from the band?

angles.name: 30 and Thriving
angles.copy: Can you believe Luke Hemmings is turning 30 on Thursday? Celebrate with 5 Seconds of Summer's biggest hits!

moments.title: Geezer Butler's 77th
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler, a pioneer of heavy metal, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath this Friday! The architect of so many iconic riffs.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler for Friday! What's your all-time favourite Sabbath track?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher Turns 41
moments.blurb: McFly guitarist, singer, and author Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: McFly Birthday
angles.copy: It's Tom Fletcher's 41st Birthday this Friday! Which McFly song is your ultimate favourite?

angles.name: Pop-Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: From pop-punk anthems to best-selling books, Happy Birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher for Friday!

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Don Henley of The Eagles this Monday! What's your favourite Eagles track or solo hit?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's voice is unforgettable. Wishing him a very happy 79th for Monday!

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Pop superstar, actress, and businesswoman Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Selena Gomez turns 34 this Monday? Celebrate with her biggest hits!

angles.name: Music & Screen Star
angles.copy: From Disney to chart-topper, Happy 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez for Monday! What's your favourite song of hers?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A heatwave is ongoing across much of England and Wales, with temperatures expected to remain above 30°C into next week, breaking records for sustained heat.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! The heatwave continues across the UK. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool!

angles.name: Welsh Heat
angles.copy: Temperatures remain high across Wales today as the heatwave continues. Stay safe in the sun!

angles.name: Devon Sunshine
angles.copy: Devon is basking in sunshine as the heatwave rolls on! Keep cool out there, folks, and enjoy the beautiful weather responsibly.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are set to begin for many pupils in England and Wales this week, with some starting as early as July 20th or 21st.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Summer holidays begin for many schools in England and Wales this week. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: School's officially out for summer for many this week! Wishing all students and families a fantastic, fun-filled break.

angles.name: Welsh Summer Break
angles.copy: The summer holidays are kicking off for schools across Wales this week! Time for adventures and making memories.
